archetype_reasoning: 361 resolved geo/elections trades across 40 distinct markets. Overall accuracy: 62.3%. Avg price: 0.605. Contested entries (0.10-0.80): 68.7%. Near-cert (>=0.90): 14.7%. Domain: Iran_ME dominant (285/361 = 79%), Russia_UKR secondary (76/361 = 21%). Iran_ME: 285 trades, 60% accuracy, 76% contested — highly significant above-random performance (z-score ~3.3 on 217 contested trades alone). Russia_UKR: 76 trades, 70% accuracy, 42% contested. Trump_US match: 40 trades extracted from broader history at 70% acc, 62% contested. The combination of 361 geo trades, 68.7% contested entry rate, and 62.3% accuracy strongly indicates genuine directional forecasting rather than yield harvesting. The 14.7% near-certainty rate is present but not dominant. PNL=$919 is low relative to trade count — data pipeline issue likely (same pattern as 3d03c46d, 6b025355, fbe2f1f7). The Iran_ME edge at 60% on 76%+ contested trades over 285 outcomes is the most statistically significant first-read finding for any NEAR_LEGENDARY qualifier this week. DOMAIN_SPECIALIST confidence is MEDIUM rather than HIGH because: (1) human review not yet performed, (2) PNL anomaly needs investigation, (3) initial profile only.
domain_strengths: Iran_ME: 285 resolved, 60% accuracy, 76% contested — statistically significant edge (z-score ~3.3). Primary signal domain.
Russia_UKR: 76 resolved, 70% accuracy, 42% contested — strong secondary edge
domain_blindspots: Data so far does not reveal clear blind spots — sample in non-core domains too thin for conclusions
domain_summary: Strong dual-domain DOMAIN_SPECIALIST: Iran_ME primary (285 trades, 60% acc, 76% contested) and Russia_UKR secondary (76 trades, 70% acc, 42% contested). The Iran_ME contested-price accuracy is the highest quality signal observed in any new qualifier this cycle. The 68.7% overall contested rate confirms this is a genuine directional trader, not a yield harvester. PNL anomaly requires investigation but does not diminish the accuracy track record.
signal_weight_reasoning: Strong domain accuracy data supports immediate DOMAIN_ONLY promotion in Iran_ME and Russia_UKR. However: (1) PNL=$919 on 361 trades is anomalously low — same pipeline issue seen in other DOMAIN_SPECIALIST profiles; (2) mandatory new-qualifier human review required before STR-003 inclusion; (3) geo_elo_active=2012.1 in NEAR_LEGENDARY range, not LEGENDARY. Setting MINIMAL pending Oscar review. PRIORITY PROMOTION CANDIDATE: if PNL investigation resolves as pipeline issue and human review clears, upgrade to DOMAIN_ONLY in both trusted domains.

Iran_ME primary (285 trades, 60% acc, 76% contested — z-score ~3.3 on contested subset alone). Russia_UKR secondary (76 trades, 70% acc). DOMAIN_SPECIALIST with MEDIUM confidence. Blocked from STR-003 inclusion by: (1) NEAR_LEGENDARY tier (not LEGENDARY), (2) PNL anomaly, (3) mandatory human review. Priority candidate for DOMAIN_ONLY promotion after review. This is a genuine signal source if the blocking items resolve.
